name: reentrancy-eth
text:
Reentrancy in FinancialPoolManager.payInstallment(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#252-345):
	External calls:
	- (success,None) = address(winner).call{value: p.goodValue}() (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#335)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- p.status = STATUS_FINISHED (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#340)
	FinancialPoolManager.pools (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#68) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- FinancialPoolManager.activatePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#157-169)
	- FinancialPoolManager.createPool(string,uint256,uint256,uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#128-151)
	- FinancialPoolManager.deletePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#175-184)
	- FinancialPoolManager.getPool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#361-388)
	- FinancialPoolManager.leavePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#216-246)
	- FinancialPoolManager.participateInPool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#190-210)

name: incorrect-equality
text:
FinancialPoolManager.payInstallment(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#252-345) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- senderInfo.payments == duePayments && ! senderInfo.received (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#287)

name: uninitialized-local
text: FinancialPoolManager.leavePool(uint256).index (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#223) is a local variable never initialized

name: missing-zero-check
text:
FinancialPoolManager.payInstallment(uint256).winner (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#324) lacks a zero-check on :
		- (success,None) = address(winner).call{value: p.goodValue}() (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#335)

name: timestamp
text:
FinancialPoolManager.payInstallment(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#252-345) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- senderInfo.payments >= duePayments (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#277)
	- senderInfo.payments == duePayments && ! senderInfo.received (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#287)

name: solc-version
text:
Version constraint ^0.8.20 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.20 (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#8)

name: low-level-calls
text:
Low level call in FinancialPoolManager.payInstallment(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#252-345):
	- (success,None) = address(winner).call{value: p.goodValue}() (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#335)
